revision.comment: Auto-generated page
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Screen reader-only/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: fix
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template redirect|sronly|sro}} {{uses TemplateStyles|Template:Screen reader-only/styles.css}} This template generates invisible text that will be read aloud by [[screen reader]]s. The text supplied as the sole unnamed parameter is not to be displayed in a browser, but should be voiced by a screen reader. First part. {{Screen reader-only|Second part only for a screen reader.}} Third part. → First part. {{Screen reader-only|Second part only for a screen reader.}} Third part. This template should only be used to hide text from sighted readers when that text substantially duplicates adjacent text that is visible. {{TOC right}} == In table captions == The main usage case is when a table is placed immediately below a heading, where the heading is effectively identical to the table's caption. This template may be used to hide the caption from a sighted reader (as it would be duplicative), while allowing a screen reader to hear the caption{{snd}} for example, if the screen reader reads a list of tables in the article to allow navigation directly to a particular table. If the table is moved to another location away from the heading, then this template should be removed to allow sighted readers to see the table caption. This is a requirement of [https://www.w3.org/TR/WCAG21/#info-and-relationships WCAG 1.3.1]. == Example == The table below has a caption "Example table" that will be voiced by a screen reader. |+ {{Screen reader-only|Example table}} === Example table === {| class="wikitable" |+ {{Screen reader-only|Example table}} |- ! scope="col" | Header ! scope="col" | Information |- ! scope="row" | Row hdr 1 | data 1 |- ! scope="row" | Row hdr 2 | data 2 |- ! scope="row" | Row hdr 3 | data 3 |} === TemplateData === {{TemplateData header|noheader=yes}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Text", "type": "string", "required": true } }, "format": "inline", "description": "The text supplied is not to be displayed in a browser, but should be voiced by a screen reader." } {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Accessibility templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia templates that change text based on client state]] }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Screen reader-only/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Screen reader-only/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Screen reader-only/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: tagging these as blank templates

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: #[[en:Template:Screen reader-only/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
